originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Combining GAE and V-Trace into a New Advantage Function for PufferLib
summary: Integrated generalized advantage estimation (GAE) with V-trace from IMPALA to create a new advantage estimation function, Puffer Advantage. Debugged off-policy experience replay and tested the new algorithm on breakout and mazes, showing improved performance over GAE alone.
